violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Clean inside microwave.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Sitting on bar counter.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Need to thaw meats under cold running.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for chlorine dishwasher.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Detergent was not being emitted in kitchen d/w. Need to prime.--Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sanitizer needs to be primed. Was emitting old quat sanitizer...need to prime line until chlorine sanitizer is present.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
